MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2002 Continued To Aug-16-02 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 514

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2002 Set For Trial On Sep-03-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-14-02 At 08:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Hearing On Plffs Application For Temporary Restr Order And Order To Show Cause Set, Per Exparte Order Of Oct-16-2001
Off Calendar Nov-01-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOVING: Peter C. Haley, Esq. and David F. Mangini (Nielsen, Haley 693-9279) for Plaintiff BRANNAN PARTNERS, L.P. petitioning for a preliminary injunction
OPPOSING: Tad A. Devlin, Esq. of (BARTKO, ZANKEL 956-1900) for defendant CM/FEDERAL LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
Argued and the Court ordered that cyclone fence stays; install a lock on the cyclone fence; the wall does not get rebuilt; the iron gate must come down; the Quest Generator cannot be interfered with. Joseph Vickstein CSR 4780

TENTATIVE RULING: Granted. Present status quo is to be maintained and re prevention use of Quest Generator denied. Failure to bear burden of proof re interference with the operation of 274 Brannan generator. Request for presentation of live testimony is denied. (md)
